response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to formally appeal the recent account block. My account was suspended due to suspicious payment activity, which I did not initiate. I am concerned that the block may have been unjustified and would like to request its unblocking.  

I have reviewed the payment history and can confirm that all transactions were legitimate and were made by me. I am committed to complying with Google’s policies and would appreciate the opportunity to resolve this matter.  

Please review the details provided and consider unblocking my account to restore normal access. I am available for a chat to discuss further.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
